response: Oppenheimer, directed by Christopher Nolan, is a 2023 drama/history film with a runtime of 180 minutes. Produced on a $100 million budget, it went on to gross $952 million at the box office and earned an 8.3/10 rating on IMDb along with a 93% score on Rotten Tomatoes. The movie’s critical and commercial success was capped off by winning the Oscar for Best Picture.
